title: eMKay® Pack of 2 – 6 Section Ice Lolly Makers – Reusable BPA-Free Moulds with Drip Guards & Sticks – 80ml Capacity – Dishwasher Safe – Great for Kids & Family Treats
features: 🍦 Make 12 Homemade Ice Lollies – Includes 2 mould with 6 sections (80ml each), ideal for single households or small families making healthy frozen treats.
✅ BPA-Free & Food Grade – Made from high-quality, food-safe PP plastic. Durable, reusable and a healthier alternative to shop-bought ice cream.
💧 Easy to Use & Clean – Easily release frozen lollies by dipping the mould in warm water. Top-rack dishwasher safe for quick cleaning.
🌈 Fun, Unique Shape – Moulds create a playful ice cream-style lolly that’s easy for children to hold. Great for toddlers and kids of all ages.
🧁 Perfect for Summer Treats – Use fruit juice, smoothies, yoghurt or milkshake recipes. A brilliant DIY kitchen activity for families.
